_description: Published meta-analysis benchmarks for RapidMeta validation. Each entry cites the source publication.

FINERENONE_REVIEW.html.source: Agarwal R et al. Lancet 2022; 400:1788-1801 (FIDELITY pooled FIDELIO-DKD + FIGARO-DKD)
FINERENONE_REVIEW.html.method: pre-specified individual patient data pooled analysis

BEMPEDOIC_ACID_REVIEW.html.source: Nissen SE et al. N Engl J Med 2023; 388:1353-1364 (CLEAR Outcomes)
BEMPEDOIC_ACID_REVIEW.html.method: single RCT (used as anchor; DL pooled with CLEAR-Harmony gives similar)

COLCHICINE_CVD_REVIEW.html.source: COLCOT (Tardif JC, N Engl J Med 2019; 381:2497) + LoDoCo2 (Nidorf SM, N Engl J Med 2020; 383:1838)
COLCHICINE_CVD_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects pooling of 2 landmark RCTs

GLP1_CVOT_REVIEW.html.source: Sattar N et al. Lancet Diabetes Endocrinol 2021; 9:653-662

SGLT2_HF_REVIEW.html.source: Vaduganathan M et al. Lancet 2022; 400:757-767 (DELIVER + DAPA-HF pooled)

PCSK9_REVIEW.html.source: Guedeney P et al. Eur Heart J 2020; 41:3336-3347 (FOURIER + ODYSSEY Outcomes)
PCSK9_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of 2 large PCSK9i outcome trials

INTENSIVE_BP_REVIEW.html.source: Internal DL pool: SPRINT-SENIOR (Williamson 2016, HR 0.66) + SPRINT-CKD (Cheung 2017, HR 0.81) + ACCORD-BP (Cushman 2010, HR 0.88) + STEP (Zhang 2021, HR 0.74) + SPS3-BP (Benavente 2013, HR 0.81). External benchmark for comparison: Xie 2016 Lancet HR 0.84 (ACM); Ettehad 2016 Lancet HR 0.87.
INTENSIVE_BP_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects of 5 intensive-BP RCTs/strata. Caveat: SPRINT-SENIOR and SPRINT-CKD are non-independent age/CKD subgroups of parent SPRINT trial; treated as separate strata for subgroup analysis. Q=3.6, df=4, I^2=0%.

SGLT2_CKD_REVIEW.html.source: Nuffield Dept Population Health. Lancet 2022; 400:1788 (SGLT2i MA: CREDENCE + DAPA-CKD + EMPA-KIDNEY)
SGLT2_CKD_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects pooling of 3 dedicated CKD trials

ARNI_HF_REVIEW.html.source: McMurray JJV (PARADIGM-HF, NEJM 2014) + Solomon SD (PARAGON-HF, NEJM 2019) + Pfeffer MA (PARADISE-MI, NEJM 2021)

ABLATION_AF_REVIEW.html.source: Marrouche NF (CASTLE-AF, NEJM 2018) + Packer DL (CABANA, JAMA 2019) + Kirchhof P (EAST-AFNET4, NEJM 2020) + Tang ASL (RAFT-AF, NEJM 2022)
ABLATION_AF_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of 4 ablation-vs-drug RCTs in HF+AF

IV_IRON_HF_REVIEW.html.source: Anker SD (CONFIRM-HF 2014, AFFIRM-AHF 2020) + Kalra PR (IRONMAN 2022) + Mentz RJ (HEART-FID 2023)
IV_IRON_HF_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of 4 IV iron RCTs in HFrEF

RENAL_DENERV_REVIEW.html.source: Azizi M (RADIANCE-HTN SOLO/TRIO) + Bohm M (SPYRAL HTN-OFF/ON MED) + Kandzari DE (SYMPLICITY HTN-3 ON-MED)
RENAL_DENERV_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of weighted mean difference in office SBP (mmHg)

DOAC_CANCER_VTE_REVIEW.html.source: Raskob GE (HOKUSAI-VTE Cancer 2018) + Young AM (SELECT-D 2018) + McBane RD (ADAM-VTE 2020) + Agnelli G (CARAVAGGIO 2020)
DOAC_CANCER_VTE_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of 4 DOAC-vs-LMWH cancer VTE RCTs

MAVACAMTEN_HCM_REVIEW.html.source: Heitner SB (EXPLORER-HCM, Lancet 2019) + Desai MY (VALOR-HCM, NEJM 2022) + Chinese Phase 3 (2023)
MAVACAMTEN_HCM_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of published adjusted odds ratios for NYHA class improvement

RIVAROXABAN_VASC_REVIEW.html.source: Eikelboom JW (COMPASS, NEJM 2017) + Bonaca MP (VOYAGER-PAD, NEJM 2020) + Zannad F (COMMANDER-HF 2018) + Mega JL (ATLAS-ACS2 2012)
RIVAROXABAN_VASC_REVIEW.html.method: DL pooling of 4 rivaroxaban vascular protection RCTs

LIPID_HUB_REVIEW.html.source: Internal DL pool: REDUCE-IT (Bhatt 2019, HR 0.75) + STRENGTH (Nicholls 2020, HR 1.02) + VITAL (Manson 2019, HR 0.92) + OMEMI (Kalstad 2021, HR 1.08) + RESPECT-EPA (Nishizaki 2024, HR 0.79)
LIPID_HUB_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects of all 5 EPA/omega-3 CVOTs. High heterogeneity (I^2~78%) reflects EPA-only (REDUCE-IT/RESPECT-EPA, beneficial) vs mixed EPA+DHA (STRENGTH/VITAL/OMEMI, neutral). Honest pool crosses null. Earlier 3-trial pool of 0.75 was selection-driven.

INCRETIN_HFpEF_REVIEW.html.primary_outcome: Worsening HF events / CV death composite
INCRETIN_HFpEF_REVIEW.html.source: Internal DL pool: STEP-HFpEF (Kosiborod 2023, Peto HR 0.18 from 1/263 vs 12/266 worsening HF) + STEP-HFpEF DM (Kosiborod 2024, Peto HR 0.40 from 7/310 vs 18/306) + SUMMIT (Packer 2024, published HR 0.62 for CV death + HF events composite)
INCRETIN_HFpEF_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects of 3 incretin HFpEF RCTs. STEP HRs Peto-derived from worsening-HF event counts (KCCQ-CSS was primary). SUMMIT contributes published Cox HR of composite primary. Outcome heterogeneity (worsening-HF vs CV-death-composite) flagged. I^2~57%.

ATTR_CM_REVIEW.html.source: DL pool: ATTR-ACT (Maurer 2018, HR 0.70) + ATTRibute-CM (Gillmore 2024, HR 0.72) + HELIOS-B (Fontana 2024, HR 0.67) + APOLLO-B (Berk 2023, Peto HR 0.99 from 10/181 vs 10/179)
ATTR_CM_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects of 4 ATTR-CM RCTs; APOLLO-B contributes Peto-derived HR (mortality was exploratory in APOLLO-B). Q=0.63, df=3, I^2=0%.

ANTIAMYLOID_AD_REVIEW.html.primary_outcome: CDR-SB change at 18 months (adjusted mean difference vs placebo)
ANTIAMYLOID_AD_REVIEW.html.source: van Dyck 2023 NEJM (Clarity-AD/NCT03887455) + Sims 2023 JAMA (TRAILBLAZER-ALZ2/NCT04437511) + Budd Haeberlein 2022 JPAD (EMERGE/NCT02484547). Range of published CDR-SB MDs: lecanemab -0.45, donanemab -0.70, aducanumab-high-dose -0.39.
ANTIAMYLOID_AD_REVIEW.html.method: Fixed-effect pool of 18-month CDR-SB change (MD) across three phase-3 anti-amyloid monoclonal antibody trials

CDK46_MBC_REVIEW.html.source: Finn 2016 NEJM (PALOMA-2/NCT01740427) + Hortobagyi 2016 NEJM (MONALEESA-2/NCT01958021) + Goetz 2017 JCO (MONARCH-3/NCT02246621). Pool of 3 CDK4/6i + AI 1st-line trials.
CDK46_MBC_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects pool of PFS HR across 3 phase 3 RCTs of CDK4/6 inhibitors + aromatase inhibitor vs AI alone in HR+/HER2- first-line mBC

ARPI_mHSPC_REVIEW.html.primary_outcome: Overall survival in metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer
ARPI_mHSPC_REVIEW.html.source: Armstrong 2022 JCO (ARCHES/NCT02677896) + Davis 2019 NEJM (ENZAMET/NCT02446405) + Chi 2019 NEJM (TITAN/NCT02489318) + Smith 2022 NEJM (ARASENS/NCT02799602). Pool of 4 AR pathway inhibitor trials in mHSPC (enzalutamide + apalutamide + darolutamide-triplet).
ARPI_mHSPC_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects OS HR pool across 4 mHSPC ARPI phase-3 RCTs. Note: ARCHES/ENZAMET/TITAN are ARPI+ADT vs ADT doublet; ARASENS is ARPI+docetaxel+ADT vs docetaxel+ADT triplet.

CANGRELOR_PCI_REVIEW.html.source: Steg PG et al. Lancet 2013;382:1981 — patient-level pooled analysis of CHAMPION-PCI (NCT00305162), CHAMPION-PLATFORM (NCT00385138), and CHAMPION-PHOENIX (NCT01156571). 24,910 patients in original IPD meta; app uses 25,384 across three CT.gov enrollment totals.
CANGRELOR_PCI_REVIEW.html.method: Patient-level IPD pooled OR for 48h primary composite across 3 CHAMPION trials

TAVR_LOWRISK_REVIEW.html.source: Siontis GCM et al. Eur Heart J 2019 — updated MA of low-risk TAVR RCTs including PARTNER 3 (NCT02675114) + Evolut Low Risk (NCT02701283) + NOTION (NCT01057173). Pooled HR for all-cause mortality at 1-2 years.
TAVR_LOWRISK_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects HR pool for ACM across 3 TAVR-vs-SAVR RCTs in low-risk patients

MITRAL_FUNCMR_REVIEW.html.source: COAPT (Stone NEJM 2018; NCT01626079) + MITRA-FR (Obadia NEJM 2018; NCT01920698) + RESHAPE-HF2 (Anker NEJM 2024; NCT02444338). DL random-effects pool of 3 MitraClip-in-functional-MR RCTs. High heterogeneity (I^2 ~75%) reflects COAPT/RESHAPE-HF2 benefit vs MITRA-FR neutral result.
MITRAL_FUNCMR_REVIEW.html.method: DL random-effects of composite primary across 3 RCTs

INCLISIRAN_REVIEW.html.source: Ray KK et al. NEJM 2020; 382:1507 (ORION-10/11) + Raal FJ et al. NEJM 2020; 382:1520 (ORION-9). Fixed-effect pool across ORION-9/10/11.
INCLISIRAN_REVIEW.html.method: Inverse-variance fixed-effect pool of time-adjusted LDL-C % change, 3 inclisiran phase III RCTs
